itemListElement.reviewBody: Very disciplined school with supportive teachers. Excellent ground and sports facility for  students. Excellent and experienced teachers who take care of students. Best school in pune. Campus is very beautiful . Teachers guide us at every step. Best teachers.

itemReviewed.name: The Sardar Dastur Hoshang Boys’ High School - Tarapore rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Its not even worthy of 1 star

(If you are thinking of taking an admission in this school for your child
Please reconsider it)

One of the worst schools in Pune
Dastur school was way better a decade ago but not today.
They don’t let the children outgrow, there is no personality development in this school
The management only cares about its name and fame, the standard of academics and teachers is going low day by day.
The management is not at all concerned about the academics
All the notes and homework are sent in PDF’s and the students are told to complete everything at home
if they wanted my child to complete everything at home then why is my child even going to the school and wasting 8 hours
Timings are not at all flexible
8am - 4pm
My child leaves home around 7:15 and comes back by 4:30
after this the child is completely tired and they have no time remaining for other activities in life
The teachers give so much of homework that the child has to come home and again sit and do their homework
Its like devoting 24/7 to Dastur School

The teachers do not know how to talk to the students they disrespect the students alot.
They also throw books, disrespect students and demotivate the students.
If the teacher itself is so disrespectful
How do i expect my child to learn discipline from this school.
Teachers are busy in their own world.

There are no extracurricular activities during the whole year.
No picnics or no other entertainment activities for students

If you are thinking of taking an admission in this school for your child
Please reconsider it and look out for other schools
As there are many better and efficient schools in Pune.

itemReviewed.name: The Sardar Dastur Hoshang Boys’ High School - Tarapore rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Worst management, activities so much no one shares the notes, only calling parents telling this and that, everytime students doing only activities,
School timings is too much my son leave at 7 am come back to 4.20pm  around and if We want extract activity football or ect students should come 1 HR early, how can you think small kids will be spending for 11hr in school 8 hours sleeping, wr is  kids studies time
Very long time for small kids
Management should work on school timings
